records.summary: Brand storytelling page covering the founding team's backgrounds and restaurant history. No transactional elements, digital integrations, or conversion features are present on this page.
records.techStackNotes: No CMS, e-commerce, or widget technology observable on this page; Instagram linked externally; contact via raw mailto links only
records.topOpportunity: No reservation widget or CTA on the page — a high-intent visitor reading the brand story has no immediate path to book a table
records.notes: Fallow is an award-winning, concept-driven restaurant with strong brand equity but this page lacks any conversion infrastructure, making it a viable lead for CRO, reservation integration, and structured content strategy.
